title: CPvP Texture Pack for PvP 1.21.11+
description: This recource-pack is designed for minecraft PvP and perfectly balances minimality and prettyness.
body:
This texture pack is made for **every pvp gamemode** in minecraft and isnt a standart _low-effort-pack_. Especially for **crystal pvp**. It makes item in your hand smaller so you can clear sight. The **crystal** and **anchor** have a pretty creative texture. None of the pictures are based on other texture packs, which makes this texture pack stick out. 

  ###   Content Summary:
  - Smaller Items in hand
  - Changed textures for common items in combat
  - Changed particles
  - Transparent GUIs & containers 
  - Aesthetic things
  
Scroll down for quick preview

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7510c079089bb68677366d7f356bf63dc0e15263.png)
